title: Rentokil PSM21 Mouse Killer Grain Bait, Black, 3.5 x 10.5 x 12.5 cm
description: From the manufacturer Rentokil Rodine Rat & Mouse Killer Grain Bait is a ready-to-use bait for use in a tamper resistant bait station. Kills in a single feed Suitable for indoor and outdoor use, in and around buildings. Anywhere that rodents have been seen, for mice commonly in cupboards, behind furniture, under floorboards and in lofts, garages and sheds. For rats, commonly in sheds, garages, under decking or near compost heaps. Follow the full instructions before use. Simply place bait inside a lockable bait station (available from Rentokil) and position in areas where mice or rats have been seen. Exclude ALL pets and children during use and remove all baits before allowing them back into the treatment area.
